description: WAI spoke health questionnaire — machine-runnable PASS/FAIL checks. Run from spoke root. Two categories: SHOULD EXIST (absence = FAIL) and SHOULD NOT EXIST (presence = FAIL). Pass all checks before distributing teachings to other spokes.

title: Node type declared
fail_means: Spoke has not declared node_type — wakeup teaching discovery will break

title: Hub path declared
check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('WAI-Spoke/WAI-State.json')); v=d.get('wheel',{}).get('hub_path'); print(v if v else 'MISSING')"
fail_means: Spoke cannot reach hub for teachings or signal routing

title: wai-lug-schema.md present with canonical storage declaration
check: grep -q 'Canonical Storage' WAI-Spoke/commands/wai-lug-schema.md 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL
fail_means: Old lug-schema — signals may be routed to wrong location

title: wai-closeout.md has Hub Signal Bulletin section
check: grep -q 'Hub Signal Bulletin' WAI-Spoke/commands/wai-closeout.md 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL
fail_means: Spoke not routing high-impact signals to hub at closeout (T-02 not applied)

title: wai.md reads from teachings_repo/
check: grep -q 'teachings_repo' WAI-Spoke/commands/wai.md 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL
fail_means: Spoke reads from old symlink path — hub migration not applied (H-02 not applied)

title: WAI-Lugs.jsonl exists
fail_means: No lug store — session knowledge lost

title: WAI-Skills.jsonl exists
fail_means: No skills registry — spoke cannot declare active skills

title: WAI-State.json exists
fail_means: No state file — spoke is not initialized

title: sessions/ directory exists
fail_means: No session track storage — track initialization will fail

title: No stale WAI-Signals.jsonl
fail_means: Old signal file still present — signals split across two stores (retire it, migrate to WAI-Lugs.jsonl)

title: No stale hub-wakeup.md
fail_means: Old hub wakeup command present — superseded by canonical wai.md

title: No AUTO-IMPLEMENT-*.md files at root
fail_means: Stale auto-implement docs at root — hub cleanup not complete

title: No stale WAI-Session-Summary.jsonl
fail_means: Old session summary file — superseded by canonical track.jsonl in sessions/

title: No stale WAI-File-Index.json
fail_means: Old file index — not used in canonical protocol

title: No WAI-Lugs.jsonl at project root (only in WAI-Spoke/)
fail_means: Lugs stored at root — canonical location is WAI-Spoke/WAI-Lugs.jsonl
